title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 04 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 04/04/2023
Image reference: 2023-04-04_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-04-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Values have firmed for Capesizes as buyers purchase against positive sentiment. Other BCs remain stable
Capesize Star Borealis and Star Polaris (179,700 DWT, Sep-Nov 2011, Hanjin Subic) sold to Norden in an en bloc deal for USD 62.50 mil, VV Value USD 57.93 mil - Scrubber. Supramax Carmencita (58,800 DWT, May 2009, Tsuneishi Cebu) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 16.00 mil, VV Value USD 16.46 mil - BWTS.
